package.name: perceptbot_sim
package.description: AIR26 workshop 05 — the Webots simulation of the perception rover. A .wbt world (arena + coloured objects + an ArUco marker), a webots_ros2 device URDF that maps the robot's distance sensors and camera to /ultrasonic/* and /camera/*, a small /cmd_vel skid-steer driver plugin, and the bringup launch. Webots is the target sim; Gazebo and MuJoCo are reference only (see THEORY.md).
